---
title: "Daily Time Series"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---


::: {.callout-tip title="Plots are interactive!"}
-   **To zoom in and out, reset or download the plot**, hover on the plot to see the option on the top right corner.
-   **To turn on and off data series**, click on the data series title in the legend located below each plot.
:::

## Eastern Bering

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}


```{r "configure region"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'



# Set region title
region_title <- "Eastern Bering"

# Load near real time data for this year and last year
nrt_df = read.csv("data/nrt_extent_EasternBering.csv")

# Load baseline data
baseline_df = read.csv("data/bs_extent_EasternBering.csv")

# Total area
total_area = 891335.77


```

```{r "configure variables"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'

library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(reshape2)
library(plotly)
library(magrittr)
library(lubridate)


## Format two recent year data

# Set last year based on 09-01 to 08-31
today <- Sys.Date()
lastyear <- ifelse(as.integer(format(today, "%m")) > 8, as.integer(format(today, "%Y")), as.integer(format(today, "%Y")) -1)


# add month_day column
nrt_df$month_day <- format(as.Date(nrt_df$date), "%m-%d")

# Subset
last_start = paste0(lastyear-1, "-09-01")
last_end = paste0(lastyear, "-08-31")
this_start = paste0(lastyear, "-09-01")
this_end = paste0(lastyear+1, "-08-31")

# Filter the dataframe for the desired date range
dat_last <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(last_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(last_end), ]
dat_this <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(this_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(this_end), ]
latest = dat_this[dat_this$date == max(dat_this$date),]

# Create month_day order
month_day_order <- c(
  format(seq(as.Date(last_start), as.Date(last_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d"),
  format(seq(as.Date(this_start), as.Date(this_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d")
)


# Reorder date
all_dates = format(seq(as.Date(last_start), as.Date(last_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d")

dat_last$month_day = factor(dat_last$month_day, levels = all_dates)
dat_this$month_day = factor(dat_this$month_day, levels = all_dates)
baseline_df$month_day = factor(baseline_df$month_day, levels = all_dates)

dat_last = dat_last[order(dat_last$month_day), ]
dat_this = dat_this[order(dat_this$month_day), ]
baseline_df = baseline_df[order(baseline_df$month_day), ]
```

```{r "configure plot"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Set plot colors
plot_colors = c("#318CE7", "#F08080", "#94C973", "#cccccc", "#cccccc", "#cccccc")

xaxis <- list(title = "Dates (MM-DD)",
            type = 'category',  # Ensures correct ordering without converting to full date format
            tickformat = "%m-%d",  # Display ticks in mm-dd format
            categoryorder = "array",  # Custom order for the x-axis
            categoryarray = month_day_order,  # Sort month_day as a category
            showline = TRUE,
            showgrid = FALSE,
            tickwidth = 1,
            ticklen = 2
            )

yaxis <- list(title = "Square km",
            showgrid = TRUE,
            zeroline = FALSE,
            showline = TRUE,
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            autorange = TRUE)

# Define horizontal line specs (total area)
hline <- function(y = 0, color = "black") {
  list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = 0,
    x1 = 1,
    xref = "paper",
    y0 = y,
    y1 = y,
    line = list(color = color, dash="dot")
  )
}


thisyear_label = paste(lastyear,"/", lastyear+1)
lastyear_label = paste(lastyear-1, "/", lastyear)

```

```{r "data processing"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs

## BASELINE PLOT ##

## Data processing

# Get upper and lower bound of sea ice extent using standard dev
baseline_df$upper_extent <- baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean + baseline_df$seaice_extent_std
baseline_df$lower_extent <- ifelse(baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std >= 0, baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std, 0)

## Draw plot
 
  # Upper extent 
fig_bs <- plot_ly(baseline_df, x = ~month_day, y = ~upper_extent, type = 'scatter', 
              mode = 'lines',line = list(color = 'transparent'),
              showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Upper bound')  %>%
  # Lower extent 
        add_trace(y = ~lower_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  fill = 'tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(0,100,80,0.2)', line = list(color = 'transparent'),
                  showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Lower bound')   %>%
  # Baseline
        add_trace(y = ~seaice_extent_mean, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  line = list(color=plot_colors[3], width  = 2),showlegend = TRUE, name = 'Baseline')  %>%

  # Last year
      add_trace(data = dat_last, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(
            color = plot_colors[2], width = 2),showlegend = TRUE,  name = lastyear_label) %>%

  # Current year
        add_trace(data = dat_this, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(color=plot_colors[1], width  = 3),showlegend = TRUE, name = thisyear_label) %>%

  # Latest point
        add_trace( x= latest$month_day,  y = latest$seaice_extent, type='scatter', mode = 'markers',
          marker = list(color=plot_colors[1], size=10),showlegend = FALSE, name = "Latest")  %>%
      
  # Style
         layout(title = "Sea ice extent time series", hovermode = "x unified", showlegend=TRUE,
         xaxis = xaxis,
         yaxis = yaxis,
         legend = list(
                        orientation = 'h',    # Horizontal legend
                        x = 0.5,              # Centered horizontally
                        xanchor = 'center',   
                        y = -0.2,             # Positioned below the chart
                        yanchor = 'top'       # Align the top of the legend with this position
                      ),
         shapes = list(hline(total_area)))%>%
        add_text(showlegend = FALSE, x = c("11-20"), y = c(total_area*1.02),
        text = c("Total Area"))

# Display
fig_bs
```


### Data downloads

-   Baseline daily extent time series (1991-2020) [Data](data/bs_extent_EasternBering.csv) - [Description](data/bs_extent_README.md)
-   Near-real-time daily extent of two recent years [Data](data/nrt_extent_EasternBering.csv) - [Description](data/nrt_extent_README.md)


:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Eastern Bering](img/ebering.png){width="200px"}
:::

::::
 


## Northern Bering
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r northern bering}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Set region title
region_title <- "Northern Bering"

# Total area
total_area = 311729.44


# Load near real time data for this year and last year
nrt_df = read.csv("data/nrt_extent_NorthernBering.csv")

# Load baseline data
baseline_df = read.csv("data/bs_extent_NorthernBering.csv")


```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false



# add month_day column
nrt_df$month_day <- format(as.Date(nrt_df$date), "%m-%d")

# Subset
last_start = paste0(lastyear-1, "-09-01")
last_end = paste0(lastyear, "-08-31")
this_start = paste0(lastyear, "-09-01")
this_end = paste0(lastyear+1, "-08-31")

# Filter the dataframe for the desired date range
dat_last <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(last_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(last_end), ]
dat_this <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(this_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(this_end), ]
latest = dat_this[dat_this$date == max(dat_this$date),]

# Get upper and lower bound of sea ice extent using standard dev
baseline_df$upper_extent <- baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean + baseline_df$seaice_extent_std
baseline_df$lower_extent <- ifelse(baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std >= 0, baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std, 0)

# Reorder date
all_dates = format(seq(as.Date(last_start), as.Date(last_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d")
dat_last$month_day = factor(dat_last$month_day, levels = all_dates)
dat_this$month_day = factor(dat_this$month_day, levels = all_dates)
baseline_df$month_day = factor(baseline_df$month_day, levels = all_dates)

dat_last = dat_last[order(dat_last$month_day), ]
dat_this = dat_this[order(dat_this$month_day), ]
baseline_df = baseline_df[order(baseline_df$month_day), ]

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs
 
# Set plot colors
plot_colors = c("#318CE7", "#F08080", "#94C973", "#cccccc", "#cccccc", "#cccccc")


month_day_order <- c(
  format(seq(as.Date("2023-09-01"), as.Date("2023-12-31"), by = "day"), "%m-%d"),
  format(seq(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-08-31"), by = "day"), "%m-%d")
)

xaxis <- list(title = "Dates (MM-DD)",
            type = 'category',  # Ensures correct ordering without converting to full date format
            tickformat = "%m-%d",  # Display ticks in mm-dd format
            categoryorder = "array",  # Custom order for the x-axis
            categoryarray = month_day_order,  # Sort month_day as a category
            showline = TRUE,
            showgrid = FALSE,
            tickwidth = 1,
            ticklen = 2
            )

yaxis <- list(title = "Square km",
            showgrid = TRUE,
            zeroline = FALSE,
            showline = TRUE,
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            autorange = TRUE)

# Define horizontal line specs (total area)
hline <- function(y = 0, color = "black") {
  list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = 0,
    x1 = 1,
    xref = "paper",
    y0 = y,
    y1 = y,
    line = list(color = color, dash="dot")
  )
}


thisyear_label = paste(lastyear,"/", lastyear+1)
lastyear_label = paste(lastyear-1, "/", lastyear)
anom_lastyear_label = paste("Anomaly: ", substr(lastyear-1,3, 4), "/", substr(lastyear, 3,4))
anom_thisyear_label = paste("Anomaly: ", substr(lastyear,3, 4), "/", substr(lastyear+1, 3,4))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs

## BASELINE PLOT ##

## Draw plot
 
  # Upper extent 
fig_bs <- plot_ly(baseline_df, x = ~month_day, y = ~upper_extent, type = 'scatter', 
              mode = 'lines',line = list(color = 'transparent'),
              showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Upper bound')  %>%
  # Lower extent 
        add_trace(y = ~lower_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  fill = 'tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(0,100,80,0.2)', line = list(color = 'transparent'),
                  showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Lower bound')   %>%
  # Baseline
        add_trace(y = ~seaice_extent_mean, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  line = list(color=plot_colors[3], width  = 2),showlegend = TRUE, name = 'Baseline')  %>%

  # Last year
      add_trace(data = dat_last, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(
            color = plot_colors[2], width = 2),showlegend = TRUE,  name = lastyear_label) %>%

  # Current year
        add_trace(data = dat_this, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(color=plot_colors[1], width  = 3),showlegend = TRUE, name = thisyear_label) %>%

  # Latest point
        add_trace( x= latest$month_day,  y = latest$seaice_extent, type='scatter', mode = 'markers',
          marker = list(color=plot_colors[1], size=10),showlegend = FALSE, name = "Latest")  %>%
      
  # Style
         layout(title = "Sea ice extent time series", hovermode = "x unified", showlegend=TRUE,
         xaxis = xaxis,
         yaxis = yaxis,
         legend = list(
                        orientation = 'h',    # Horizontal legend
                        x = 0.5,              # Centered horizontally
                        xanchor = 'center',   
                        y = -0.2,             # Positioned below the chart
                        yanchor = 'top'       # Align the top of the legend with this position
                      ),
         shapes = list(hline(total_area)))%>%
        add_text(showlegend = FALSE, x = c("11-20"), y = c(total_area*1.02),
        text = c("Total Area"))

# Display
fig_bs
```


### Data downloads

-   Baseline daily extent time series (1991-2020) [Data](data/bs_extent_NorthernBering.csv) - [Description](data/bs_extent_README.md)
-   Near-real-time daily extent of two recent years [Data](data/nrt_extent_NorthernBering.csv) - [Description](data/nrt_extent_README.md)


:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Eastern Bering](img/nbering.png){width="200px"}
:::

::::

## Southeastern Bering
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'


## REGION SPECIFIC INFO ##

# Set region title
region_title <- "Southeastern Bering"

# Total area
total_area = 311729.44

# Load baseline data
baseline_df = read.csv("data/bs_extent_SoutheasternBering.csv")


# Load near real time data for this year and last year
nrt_df = read.csv("data/nrt_extent_SoutheasternBering.csv")

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# add month_day column


# add month_day column
nrt_df$month_day <- format(as.Date(nrt_df$date), "%m-%d")

# Subset
last_start = paste0(lastyear-1, "-09-01")
last_end = paste0(lastyear, "-08-31")
this_start = paste0(lastyear, "-09-01")
this_end = paste0(lastyear+1, "-08-31")

# Filter the dataframe for the desired date range
dat_last <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(last_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(last_end), ]
dat_this <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(this_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(this_end), ]
latest = dat_this[dat_this$date == max(dat_this$date),]

# Get upper and lower bound of sea ice extent using standard dev
baseline_df$upper_extent <- baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean + baseline_df$seaice_extent_std
baseline_df$lower_extent <- ifelse(baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std >= 0, baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std, 0)

# Reorder date
all_dates = format(seq(as.Date(last_start), as.Date(last_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d")
dat_last$month_day = factor(dat_last$month_day, levels = all_dates)
dat_this$month_day = factor(dat_this$month_day, levels = all_dates)
baseline_df$month_day = factor(baseline_df$month_day, levels = all_dates)

dat_last = dat_last[order(dat_last$month_day), ]
dat_this = dat_this[order(dat_this$month_day), ]
baseline_df = baseline_df[order(baseline_df$month_day), ]

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs
 
# Set plot colors
plot_colors = c("#318CE7", "#F08080", "#94C973", "#cccccc", "#cccccc", "#cccccc")


month_day_order <- c(
  format(seq(as.Date(last_start), as.Date(last_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d"),
  format(seq(as.Date(this_start), as.Date(this_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d")
)

xaxis <- list(title = "Dates (MM-DD)",
            type = 'category',  # Ensures correct ordering without converting to full date format
            tickformat = "%m-%d",  # Display ticks in mm-dd format
            categoryorder = "array",  # Custom order for the x-axis
            categoryarray = month_day_order,  # Sort month_day as a category
            showline = TRUE,
            showgrid = FALSE,
            tickwidth = 1,
            ticklen = 2
            )

yaxis <- list(title = "Square km",
            showgrid = TRUE,
            zeroline = FALSE,
            showline = TRUE,
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            autorange = TRUE)

# Define horizontal line specs (total area)
hline <- function(y = 0, color = "black") {
  list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = 0,
    x1 = 1,
    xref = "paper",
    y0 = y,
    y1 = y,
    line = list(color = color, dash="dot")
  )
}


thisyear_label = paste(lastyear,"/", lastyear+1)
lastyear_label = paste(lastyear-1, "/", lastyear)
anom_lastyear_label = paste("Anomaly: ", substr(lastyear-1,3, 4), "/", substr(lastyear, 3,4))
anom_thisyear_label = paste("Anomaly: ", substr(lastyear,3, 4), "/", substr(lastyear+1, 3,4))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs

## BASELINE PLOT ##

## Data processing

# Get upper and lower bound of sea ice extent using standard dev
baseline_df$upper_extent <- baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean + baseline_df$seaice_extent_std
baseline_df$lower_extent <- ifelse(baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std >= 0, baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std, 0)

## Draw plot
 
  # Upper extent 
fig_bs <- plot_ly(baseline_df, x = ~month_day, y = ~upper_extent, type = 'scatter', 
              mode = 'lines',line = list(color = 'transparent'),
              showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Upper bound')  %>%
  # Lower extent 
        add_trace(y = ~lower_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  fill = 'tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(0,100,80,0.2)', line = list(color = 'transparent'),
                  showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Lower bound')   %>%
  # Baseline
        add_trace(y = ~seaice_extent_mean, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  line = list(color=plot_colors[3], width  = 2),showlegend = TRUE, name = 'Baseline')  %>%

  # Last year
      add_trace(data = dat_last, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(
            color = plot_colors[2], width = 2),showlegend = TRUE,  name = lastyear_label) %>%

  # Current year
        add_trace(data = dat_this, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(color=plot_colors[1], width  = 3),showlegend = TRUE, name = thisyear_label) %>%

  # Latest point
        add_trace( x= latest$month_day,  y = latest$seaice_extent, type='scatter', mode = 'markers',
          marker = list(color=plot_colors[1], size=10),showlegend = FALSE, name = "Latest")  %>%
      
  # Style
         layout(title = "Sea ice extent time series", hovermode = "x unified", showlegend=TRUE,
         xaxis = xaxis,
         yaxis = yaxis,
         legend = list(
                        orientation = 'h',    # Horizontal legend
                        x = 0.5,              # Centered horizontally
                        xanchor = 'center',   
                        y = -0.2,             # Positioned below the chart
                        yanchor = 'top'       # Align the top of the legend with this position
                      ),
         shapes = list(hline(total_area)))%>%
        add_text(showlegend = FALSE, x = c("11-20"), y = c(total_area*1.02),
        text = c("Total Area"))

# Display
fig_bs
```

### Data downloads


-   Baseline daily extent time series (1991-2020) [Data](data/bs_extent_SoutheasternBering.csv) - [Description](data/bs_extent_README.md)
-   Near-real-time daily extent of two recent years [Data](data/nrt_extent_SoutheasternBering.csv) - [Description](data/nrt_extent_README.md)


:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Southeastern Bering](img/sebering.png){width="200px"}
:::

::::
## Alaskan Arctic

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'


# Set region title
region_title <- "Alaskan Arctic"

# Total area
total_area = 511126.86

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false


# Load baseline data
baseline_df = read.csv("data/bs_extent_AlaskanArctic.csv")

# Load near real time data for this year and last year
nrt_df = read.csv("data/nrt_extent_AlaskanArctic.csv")

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# add month_day column

## Format two recent year data

# add month_day column
nrt_df$month_day <- format(as.Date(nrt_df$date), "%m-%d")

# Define date range
last_start = paste0(lastyear-1, "-09-01")
last_end = paste0(lastyear, "-08-31")
this_start = paste0(lastyear, "-09-01")
this_end = paste0(lastyear+1, "-08-31")

# Filter the dataframe for the desired date range
dat_last <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(last_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(last_end), ]
dat_this <- nrt_df[nrt_df$date >= as.Date(this_start) & nrt_df$date <= as.Date(this_end), ]
latest <- dat_this[dat_this$date == max(dat_this$date),]

# Get upper and lower bound of sea ice extent using standard dev
baseline_df$upper_extent <- baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean + baseline_df$seaice_extent_std
baseline_df$lower_extent <- ifelse(baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std >= 0, baseline_df$seaice_extent_mean - baseline_df$seaice_extent_std, 0)

# Reorder date
all_dates = format(seq(as.Date(last_start), as.Date(last_end), by = "day"), "%m-%d")

dat_last$month_day = factor(dat_last$month_day, levels = all_dates)
dat_this$month_day = factor(dat_this$month_day, levels = all_dates)
baseline_df$month_day = factor(baseline_df$month_day, levels = all_dates)

dat_last = dat_last[order(dat_last$month_day), ]
dat_this = dat_this[order(dat_this$month_day), ]
baseline_df = baseline_df[order(baseline_df$month_day), ]


```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs
 
# Set plot colors
plot_colors = c("#318CE7", "#F08080", "#94C973", "#cccccc", "#cccccc", "#cccccc")

xaxis <- list(title = "Dates (MM-DD)",
            type = 'category',  # Ensures correct ordering without converting to full date format
            tickformat = "%m-%d",  # Display ticks in mm-dd format
            categoryorder = "array",  # Custom order for the x-axis
            categoryarray = all_dates,  # Sort month_day as a category
            showline = TRUE,
            showgrid = FALSE,
            tickwidth = 1,
            ticklen = 2
            )

yaxis <- list(title = "Square km",
            showgrid = TRUE,
            zeroline = FALSE,
            showline = TRUE,
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            autorange = TRUE)

# Define horizontal line specs (total area)
hline <- function(y = 0, color = "black") {
  list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = 0,
    x1 = 1,
    xref = "paper",
    y0 = y,
    y1 = y,
    line = list(color = color, dash="dot")
  )
}


thisyear_label = paste(lastyear,"/", lastyear+1)
lastyear_label = paste(lastyear-1, "/", lastyear)
anom_lastyear_label = paste("Anomaly: ", substr(lastyear-1,3, 4), "/", substr(lastyear, 3,4))
anom_thisyear_label = paste("Anomaly: ", substr(lastyear,3, 4), "/", substr(lastyear+1, 3,4))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Set Axis specs

## BASELINE PLOT ##

## Draw plot


  # Upper extent 
fig_bs <- plot_ly(baseline_df, x = ~month_day, y = ~upper_extent, type = 'scatter', 
              mode = 'lines',line = list(color = 'transparent'),
              showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Upper bound')  %>%
  # Lower extent 
        add_trace(y = ~lower_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  fill = 'tonexty', fillcolor='rgba(0,100,80,0.2)', line = list(color = 'transparent'),
                  showlegend = FALSE, name = 'Lower bound')   %>%
  # Baseline
        add_trace(y = ~seaice_extent_mean, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
                  line = list(color=plot_colors[3], width  = 2),showlegend = TRUE, name = 'Baseline')  %>%

  # Last year
      add_trace(data = dat_last, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(
            color = plot_colors[2], width = 2),showlegend = TRUE,  name = lastyear_label) %>%

  # Current year
        add_trace(data = dat_this, x = ~month_day, y = ~seaice_extent, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines',
            line = list(color=plot_colors[1], width  = 3),showlegend = TRUE, name = thisyear_label) %>%

  # Latest point
        add_trace( x= latest$month_day,  y = latest$seaice_extent, type='scatter', mode = 'markers',
          marker = list(color=plot_colors[1], size=10),showlegend = FALSE, name = "Latest")  %>%
      
  # Style
         layout(title = "Sea ice extent time series", hovermode = "x unified", showlegend=TRUE,
         xaxis = xaxis,
         yaxis = yaxis,
         legend = list(
                        orientation = 'h',    # Horizontal legend
                        x = 0.5,              # Centered horizontally
                        xanchor = 'center',   
                        y = -0.2,             # Positioned below the chart
                        yanchor = 'top'       # Align the top of the legend with this position
                      ),
         shapes = list(hline(total_area)))%>%
        add_text(showlegend = FALSE, x = c("11-20"), y = c(total_area*1.02),
        text = c("Total Area"))

# Display
fig_bs
```

### Data downloads

-   Baseline daily extent time series (1991-2020) [Data](data/bs_extent_AlaskanArctic.csv) - [Description](data/bs_extent_README.md)
-   Near-real-time daily extent of two recent years [Data](data/nrt_recent_AlaskanArctic.csv) - [Description](data/nrt_extent_README.md)



:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Alaskan Arctic ](img/arctic.png){width="200px"}



:::

::::
